support_intro: For help with Lucky Pond, feedback, or issue reports, contact us by email.

privacy.collection_summary: Lucky Pond stores game progress, settings, resources, fish records, gear, decor, event progress, and achievements on your device. The app does not require an account and does not collect personal information directly through gameplay, except for information you voluntarily provide when contacting support.
data_types: Local gameplay progress and settings stored on your device.
Device permission choices managed by iOS, including the App Tracking Transparency system prompt when requested.
